visual_summary: A pulsating button that animates with a heartbeat rhythm, suitable for call-to-actions, promotions, or invitations to engage with your application or website.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Pulsating Button Demo
Description: A pulsating button that animates with a heartbeat rhythm, suitable for call-to-actions, promotions, or invitations to engage with your application or website.
Style: e.g. minimal, material, pulse
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: button, animation, cta

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { PulsatingButton } from "@/registry/magicui/pulsating-button"

export default function PulsatingButtonDemo() {
  return <PulsatingButton>Join Affiliate Program</PulsatingButton>
}
